design_philosophy: Earthy, grounded, and calming. The design prioritizes organic shapes, generous spacing, and a tactile feel to evoke trust and natural wellness.

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: The 'Bento' Grid for results, single-column max-w-3xl centralized for the form to ensure focus.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for symptom pills/chips.

hero.style: Asymmetric text alignment, overlapping organic imagery, subtle texture background.

dosha_analyzer_form.inputs: Shadcn components customized. Use flat solid backgrounds for inputs with 1px earthy borders.
dosha_analyzer_form.multi_select_symptoms: Pill-shaped toggle chips (rounded-full). Unselected: surface_secondary + border. Selected: primary background + white text.
dosha_analyzer_form.lifestyle_radio: Segmented control style, full width, rounded-xl.

results_card.style: Clay & Crisp Neumorphism. Background matches parent but has soft ambient shadow and 1px sharp border. Highlight the dominant dosha color.

buttons.primary: Solid #4A7C59, rounded-full, px-8 py-3, subtle hover lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.

motion.page_load: Fade in, slightly stagger children. 0.6s duration, ease-out.
motion.hover: Buttons and cards lift slightly up (-translate-y-1).
motion.form_submit: Smooth transition to results using AnimatePresence from Framer Motion.

image_urls.description: Sand dune wavy lines, use as a very subtle, low-opacity (10-20%) textured background overlay or split hero image.
Close up of fresh green plant, represents herbs and natural healing. Use in the About section.
Ripples on water at sunset. Can be used in the Dosha or lifestyle advice section as an ambient image.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the Hero section, avoiding standard Shadcn cards there to keep it creative.
Use Shadcn UI for the form inputs, but heavily customize them to remove the default 'Vercel' look (e.g., soften borders, use earthy colors, rounded-full for pills).
Implement the symptoms as a flex-wrap container of interactive toggle pills.
Add 'lucide-react' for icons (e.g., Leaf, Wind, Flame, Droplet).
Do not use generic 'Inter' font. Import Cormorant Garamond and Manrope from Google Fonts in index.css.
Avoid using full transparent headers over images; use a solid #F9F6F0 header or slightly transparent glass with blur.
For the results history, map over the saved items and display them in a clean list or small bento grid.
Remember to use .js files for React components, not .tsx as per project requirements.
